description: This square-toed three-hole lace up shoes from woodland references the classic penny loafer in style and the work boot in silhouetting and the stitch detail. Meticulously designed for optimal foot freedom, this shoe is crafted in a beautifully tanned espresso colour. Style this with classic denims, a monochrome tee and a tonal jacket.UpperTwo-tone suede upper with aggressive stitch detailStitches at the seams of the toe boxCentral two-hole lace upsPadded tonguePull loop at heel collarEmbossed branding on the midfootLeather liningPadded insole for instep comfortMidsoleRubber midsole for cushioned comfortOutsoleDual density TPU outsole with geometric lugs and terraced grooves for grip and tractionOutsole reinforced onto the upper at the heel for abrasion free comfortShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
